---
title: Real-Time Spatio-Temporal LiDAR Point Cloud Compression
author:
- Yu Feng
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/iros20.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/real-time-spatio-temporal-lidar-point-cloud-compression
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/Real-Time-Spatio-Temporal-LiDAR-Point-Cloud-Compression
journ: IROS
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 42
---
